posts.title: Unreal Engine 5.8 is officially here — and Eagle 3D Streaming fully supports it. 🚀 Epic Games just released their biggest UE5 update yet at State of Unreal 2026, and several of the new features directly level up what's possible with pixel streaming. MegaLights is now Production-Ready — thousands of dynamic lights with fixed-cost shadows rendered in real time. For streamed 3D experiences, this means richer, more cinematic visuals without the performance hit. Lumen Lite (Beta) brings dynamic globa

Running a client demo with a high-end 3D app used to mean expensive hardware, messy setup, and one person at the wheel while everyone else just watched. Eagle 3D Streaming flips that. Stream your Unreal Engine app directly in the browser — no installs, no GPU required on the client side. And the best part? Most VR developers hit these errors and think something is fundamentally wrong with their setup. It's not. These are fixable — in minutes. We broke down the 5 most common VR Pixel Streaming errors that trip up Unreal Engine developers, exactly why they happen, and the precise steps to resolve each one.
